race.comment: FAN HARDER (2) is a genuine four-year-old gelding who resumed with a solid second last time out at Scone over 1300m. Strips fitter second-up and gets in light with the 4kg claimer engaged from a good draw. Bold showing anticipated. WINNING EMOTIONS (3) drifted well back when resuming last start before winding up strongly to finish third, beaten 1.75 lengths, over 1010m at Moruya. A repeat of the latest effort will see him in the finish again. CHAMPERS GIRL (4) finished adrift in sixth last time at Bathurst after being prominent at the corner in a disappointing performance. Finds a nice race and can bounce back. ODE SO MUCH (5) was in contention on the turn and finished third last start at the first run back from a spell over this trip at Parkes. Fitter for that run and is in the mix.
